query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT id, 'Number Sense and Operations', 'Understanding integers, fractions, decimals, percentages, and basic arithmetic operations. Learn how to work with positive and negative numbers, order of operations, and real-world applications.', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Algebraic Thinking', 'Introduction to variables, expressions, equations, and functions. Learn to solve linear equations, work with polynomials, and understand algebraic relationships.', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Geometry and Measurement', 'Explore shapes, angles, area, volume, and the Pythagorean theorem. Understand coordinate geometry and how to apply geometric concepts to real-world problems.', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Data Analysis and Probability', 'Learn to interpret graphs, charts, and statistical data. Understand mean, median, mode, and basic probability concepts.', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Functions and Patterns', 'Understand function notation, domain and range, and how to identify patterns in sequences and data.', 5, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Rational Expressions and Equations', 'Work with fractions containing variables, solve rational equations, and understand asymptotes.', 6, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Quadratic Functions', 'Master quadratic equations, parabolas, and the quadratic formula. Learn to factor and complete the square.', 7, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA' UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'Exponential and Radical Expressions', 'Understand exponent rules, radicals, and rational exponents. Learn to simplify and solve equations with these expressions.', 8, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MA';
